design_philosophy: Calm, trust, and clinical credibility without the sterile 'health app' feel. Prioritize warmth, generous spacing, and organic color palettes. Use bento grids for structured dashboard data.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy (2-3x more spacing). Tailwind Scale: p-6, p-8, p-12.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: MODE B: 'CONTROL ROOM' Grid. Tight gaps (gap-6). Use bento layout for Patient and Admin dashboards. Widgets must stretch to fill heights.
spacing_and_layout.marketing_grid: MODE A: 'TETRIS' Grid. Wide gaps (gap-8 to gap-12). Asymmetric alignments.
spacing_and_layout.borders_and_radius: Subtle roundness, max 8px (rounded-lg). All cards must have a 1px solid border (border-border) with no drop shadow by default.

surfaces.cards: Flat background, 1px border, no shadow. On hover: -translate-y-1, shadow-lg, border color darkens.
surfaces.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70, 1px bottom border border-border/40.

components_strategy.general: Always add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements for testing.
components_strategy.buttons: Rounded-lg, minimal shadows. Primary buttons use Deep Forest Green. Accent buttons use Terracotta.
components_strategy.cards: Use Shadcn Card for dashboards but strip heavy shadows. Use flat, rectangular, dense styles.
components_strategy.forms: Use Shadcn Input/Select/Form. Inputs must have clear focus states (ring-2 ring-primary).
components_strategy.charts: Use Recharts or Shadcn Charts. Palettes must map to risk_levels or earthy greens/sages. Avoid default vivid chart colors.
components_strategy.icons: Use lucide-react (default). Stroke width 1.5 for a sophisticated, light feel.
components_strategy.badges: Used for AI Emotion Chips, Risk Levels, and Status. Soft backgrounds with darker text (e.g., bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground).

animations.page_transitions: Fade and slight slide-up (translate-y-4 to 0, opacity 0 to 1).
animations.lists: Staggered entrance animations for dashboard feed/list items.

hero_background.description: Minimalist abstract organic waves for the landing page hero section. Use with bg-black/10 or no overlay if text is dark.

auth_background.description: Clean, minimalist doctor workspace for the side panel of the Login/Signup screen.

doctor_avatar_1.description: Avatar/Portrait for Doctor booking cards or Admin approval lists.

doctor_avatar_2.description: Avatar/Portrait for Doctor booking cards or Admin approval lists.

mood_nature_1.description: Serene sunset reflection. Can be used in Patient Journal headers or breathing exercise sections.

mood_nature_2.description: Serene abstract seascape for Patient Dashboard headers.

landing_page.layout: Mode A Tetris grid. Hero section with `hero_background`. Heavy typography. Emotional copy emphasizing trust.
landing_page.components: Custom HTML/Tailwind, Marquee for features/benefits (slow, subtle). Glassmorphism header.

auth.layout: Split screen: left side form (clean, white background), right side `auth_background` image covering full height.
auth.components: Firebase Email/Password + Google Sign-In button (use Shadcn Button with outline variant and Google SVG).

role_selection.layout: Centered clean cards allowing user to pick Patient, Doctor, or Admin. Large padding, hover effects.
role_selection.components: Bento style cards for each role.

patient_dashboard.layout: Mode B Control Room Grid. Top banner for risk detection (uses accent color if high risk).
patient_dashboard.features: Mood log bento box (1-10 slider + multiselect chips). Journaling box with AI emotion detection display (chips below text area). Analytics chart (Recharts line chart).
patient_dashboard.assessments: Clean, step-by-step wizard UI for PHQ-9 & GAD-7 with clear, un-intimidating typography.

doctor_dashboard.layout: Sidebar navigation. Main area uses Mode B Grid.
doctor_dashboard.features: Appointment calendar/list, Patient list. Approval pending screen must be a clean, centered message with an organic graphic if they are not yet approved by Admin.

admin_dashboard.features: Table for pending doctors (Approve/Reject actions). High-risk users monitor panel with Terracotta alerts. System stats in top bento boxes.
